scripts.install:backend: python3 -m venv backend/.venv && backend/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && backend/.venv/bin/pip install -r backend/requirements.txt -r backend/requirements-dev.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait db
scripts.db:fresh: npm run db:reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
